response: {"commands":[{"command_template":"fastq-dump {accession}","description":"Download raw sequencing data (iCLIP, HITS-CLIP, and PAR-CLIP datasets) from SRA/ERA as FASTQ files","required_inputs":["SRA/ERA accession numbers (listed in Supplementary Table 1)"],"outputs":["FASTQ files (raw sequencing reads)"],"parameters":{"accession":"{SRA/ERA accession from Supplementary Table 1}"}}]}
